description_long: This is a modern, expansive bungalow with a flat roof and a multi-level design, surrounded by a lush green lawn and enclosed by a hedge and fence. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, wooden deck areas, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a swimming pool and a covered patio. The front facade is marked by a prominent entryway, flanked by palm trees and a paved driveway leading to a gated entrance. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious backyard with a swing set and additional seating areas, while the side features a glass-enclosed sunroom or greenhouse. The building's exterior combines white and gray walls with natural wood accents, creating a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and ample natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood decks, and extensive outdoor spaces, surrounded by greenery and a fence. The design features multiple living areas, a pool, and a sunroom, all in a sleek, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, palm trees, driveway, and a prominent wooden deck with large glass windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the wooden deck, side lawn, and the glass-enclosed sunroom or greenhouse area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the backyard with a swing set, pool, and extensive glass walls opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the backyard lawn, pool area, and the rear facade with grouped windows and outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
